paragraphs: I’m a passionate and performance-driven Full Stack Developer with over 1.5 years of professional experience at Cybercom Creation, where I’ve grown from an intern into a key contributor on production-grade systems.

I bring strong expertise in building and deploying web applications using modern technologies such as Vue.js, Nuxt.js, React.js, Node.js, and GraphQL, combined with hands-on knowledge of scalable backend systems, secure APIs, and front-end architecture.

My experience extends beyond development—I’m also proficient in Docker-based deployment workflows, CI/CD automation with Jenkins and GitHub Actions, and cloud infrastructure on AWS. I take pride in writing clean, modular code and creating systems that are both maintainable and efficient.

highlights.title: Clean Code
highlights.description: Writing maintainable, modular, and efficient code architectures.

highlights.title: Modern UI/UX
highlights.description: Creating responsive and intuitive UIs using Vue/Nuxt and React.

highlights.title: Performance
highlights.description: Managing databases like MySQL, MongoDB, and Neo4j with performance in mind.

experience.title: Software Engineer
description: Contributed significantly to the 1StopBedrooms project, enhancing its development, performance, and success, while driving innovation.
Utilized GraphQL for efficient data querying and backend communication, optimizing data retrieval and performance load times.
Developed robust front-end applications with Vue.js and Nuxt.js, ensuring smooth, intuitive user-friendly functionality.
Focused on creating scalable, high-performance web components and ensuring seamless integration between front-end and backend services.

experience.title: Full Stack Intern
description: Developed a strong foundation in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and MySQL, building dynamic, responsive web applications with backend integration.
Worked with Angular, TypeScript, Vue.js, and Nuxt.js to create scalable, high-performance web solutions for various applications.
Focused on developing reusable components for improved code maintainability, efficiency, and streamlined database management.

education.degree: Bachelor's degree, Information and Commutation Technology

projects.title: Agriculture E-commerce Platform
projects.description: Developed a platform with user registration, OTP authentication, and JWT token-based login for secure access and enhanced security. Implemented features for product browsing, purchasing, and payments using Razorpay, ensuring a smooth experience. Utilized React JS for the frontend and Express JS for backend APIs, while managing data with MySQL to ensure reliable database management.

projects.title: Social Media API
projects.description: Created a RESTful API using Node.js and Neo4j to manage users, posts, comments, and friendships, leveraging the graph database. Implemented REST endpoints for profile management, post creation, commenting, and social interactions, ensuring scalability and functionality. Included Swagger for comprehensive API documentation and testing, improving usability, reliability, and ease of integration.

projects.title: AWS Nuke Desktop Tool
projects.description: Created a desktop application using Electron JS for managing AWS resources and automating cleanup for better cloud management. Integrated the aws-nuke CLI to efficiently remove specific AWS resources, enhancing resource control and management. Implemented a user-friendly interface for seamless AWS resource management, ensuring smooth interactions and reliable performance.
